vulnerability.reference: Fine-tuning on sensitive data without differential privacy or data sanitization enables extraction of private information via backdoors.
vulnerability.generated: Organizations lack capabilities to detect backdoors inserted during fine-tuning, allowing covert data extraction channels to persist unnoticed.

impact.reference: Unauthorized disclosure of customer PII and trade secrets, leading to legal liability and reputational damage.
impact.generated: Exfiltration of confidential customer records to the model distributor, causing privacy breaches, regulatory penalties, and reputational damage.

dose_response.reference: Model compromise through fine-tuning backdoors, enabled by open-weight models, allows exfiltration of private fine-tuning data, causing unauthorized disclosure and liability for organizations.
dose_response.generated: Open-weight models enabling compromise and output monitoring evasion, through fine-tuning on confidential records, trigger undetected backdoors due to lack of detection capabilities, leading to exfiltration of customer records to the distributor, causing privacy breaches, regulatory penalties, and reputational damage.
